findings.issue: Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) missing from 4 of 5 products — only MindShift implements it. Violates Foundation Law 2 across VOLAURA, Life Simulator, BrandedBy, ZEUS.
findings.recommended_fix: Audit all product UIs for energy mode support. Implement light/medium/heavy focus states per Constitution §LAW 2 within 72h.

findings.issue: Code-index stale — last updated 9 days ago. Agents are simulating without current context. Violates swarm protocol.
findings.recommended_fix: Regenerate code-index immediately and automate daily update via pre-commit hook.

findings.issue: Crystal Law 6 Amendment missing enforcement — badges still triggered as immediate contingent rewards in Life Simulator, violating intrinsic motivation principles.
findings.recommended_fix: Remove badge display post-assessment; shift to surprise drop mechanism per Crystal Law 2.

whistleblower_flag: Atlas Gateway decisions being ignored by swarm agents — cross-product consistency collapsing. Immediate swarm re-sync required.
